stemHtml: The Second Freedom of the Air is demonstrated in which of the following examples?

options.a: A flight from State A to State C with an intermediate stop in State B where some of the passengers disembark but NO new passengers or cargo board the aircraft.
options.b: A flight from State A to State C with an intermediate fuel stop in State B where NO passengers or cargo disembark or embark.
options.c: A flight from State A to State B which does NOT involve any third state.
options.d: A flight from State A to State C, which overflies State B on the way WITHOUT any intermediate stop.
